query: Qualia Life Sciences SEC filing Form D Neurohacker current
answer: Qualia Life Sciences has not filed any SEC reports recently. Its Exchange Act registration has been revoked. Neurohacker Collective is a legal entity associated with Qualia.

| 9th | Logo for DripDrop  DripDrop 2008, San Francisco  (United States), Series B | Online retailer of electrolyte drink mixes for rapid hydration needs | $14.6M | Pacific Advantage Capital, Camprow Capital | 41/100 | [...] | 5th | Logo for Cymbiotika  Cymbiotika San Diego  (United States), Funding Raised | Provider of natural and organic supplements using liposomal delivery systems. It offers a range of supplements focused on various health benefits, including immunity, brain health, and stress relief. The company emphasizes the use of high-quality, traceable ingredients and advanced liposomal delivery to enhance nutrient absorption. Products are available through a subscription service or one-time purchases. A wellness quiz assists customers in selecting personalized supplement plans. The company also offers pet supplements.
